mnemonics.title: Mnemonic 1
mnemonics.content: PMF: Points Measure Frequency (for discrete outcomes)

mnemonics.title: Mnemonic 2
mnemonics.content: PDF: Picture Density Function (area under curve = probability)

mnemonics.title: Mnemonic 3
mnemonics.content: Discrete = Distinct Points, Continuous = Curved Line

mnemonics.title: Key Point 1
mnemonics.content: A PMF gives the probability that a discrete random variable is exactly equal to some value.

mnemonics.title: Key Point 2
mnemonics.content: A PDF describes the relative likelihood for a continuous random variable to take on a given value; probability is the area under the curve.

mnemonics.title: Key Point 3
mnemonics.content: The sum of all probabilities in a PMF equals 1. The total area under a PDF curve equals 1.
